steps.title: Compare the theories
steps.content: The first sentence gives the long-held view that humans arrived in the Americas about 13,000 years ago. The second introduces research suggesting arrival more than 30,000 years ago, much earlier than previously thought.

steps.title: Select a contrast signal
steps.content: A signals a result, but the new finding is not caused by the old view. B signals similarity, and D signals conclusion. The relationship is contrast between the old timeline and the new evidence. The answer is C.
